75152.subject: Passage is expanding CoinList's mission
75152.body:
What the CLARITY Act means for Token Launches

( http://coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=6.25 )

🎉 *Congratulations to the Arcium team!* We're proud to have supported their journey and the community's access to ARX and are excited for <confidential>.

*🚀 Introducing Passage by CoinList:* Passage is the infrastructure powering that transition, connecting issuers, platforms, and investors through compliant distribution for tokenized assets.

📖 *Featured Blog: What the CLARITY Act Means for Token Launches*
We break down the operational impact, and what founders should be doing now to prepare.

( http://passage.coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=banner&utm_campaign=6.25 )

*Introducing Passage by CoinList*

For years, CoinList has helped bring groundbreaking crypto projects to market.

Now we're expanding that mission.

Passage is the infrastructure powering compliant access to the next generation of onchain capital markets, helping issuers distribute tokenized assets and enabling platforms to offer investment opportunities directly to their users.

LEARN MORE ( http://passage.coinlist.co?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=button&utm_campaign=6.25 )

*Architecture Over Ambiguity: How CLARITY Rewrites Token Offers, Distributions, and Listings*

The proposed CLARITY Act could fundamentally change how token projects approach launches, distributions, and exchange listings. Explore what the framework means for builders, why ambiguity may no longer be enough, and the practical considerations teams should be planning for today.

READ MORE ( http://blog.coinlist.co/architecture-over-ambiguity-how-clarity-rewrites-token-offers-distributions-and-listings-for-trading?utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=button&utm_campaign=6.25 )

Legal Notice

The products, services, information and/or materials referenced may not be available for all individuals or residents of certain jurisdictions.

This email is being distributed by CoinList Global Services , dba “CoinList,” or one of its affiliates. This email and use of the CoinList website is subject to certain disclosures, restrictions and risks, available here ( https://coinlist.co/disclaimers ). Nothing in this presentation shall constitute or be construed as an offering of securities or as investment advice, tax advice or investment recommendations (i.e., recommendations as to whether to enter or not to enter into any transaction involving any specific interest or interests) by CoinList, or any of its affiliates or a recommendation as to an investment or other strategy.

The information in this email is subject to change without notice. CoinList makes no representations or endorsements whatsoever regarding any third-party content/sites that may be accessible directly or indirectly from this email or the CoinList website. While CoinLists takes reasonable efforts to confirm the information presented in this newsletter, it makes no representations,
